pin_pal_game.description: Pin Pal (Wii Sports-style ten-pin bowling) — 1-4 player turn-based match. Aim with the cursor sliding the spawn position along the throw line, hold LMB to charge a power meter, release to fire. Standard 10-frame scoring with strikes (X), spares (/), and a bonus throw on the 10th frame for strike or spare. Host owns scoring, pin reset, and turn rotation; throws are read locally by the active player and broadcast.
